title: carota sativa
intro: Carota sativa, commonly known as the wild carrot or Queen Anne's lace, is a biennial plant belonging to the parsley family (Apiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carota sativa include its ability to support digestive health, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Carota sativa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used as a natural remedy for various health conditions, including fever, colds, and menstrual issues.
